events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th, a milestone for the legendary Beatles drummer who turns 86 this year.

angles.name: Ringo at 86
angles.copy: Ringo Starr turns 86, we celebrate the life and career of the Beatles legend, who turns 86 this year.

events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Queen's lead guitarist Brian May celebrates his 74th birthday on July 19th, a day to recognize his incredible contributions to rock music as he turns 74.

angles.name: Brian May at 74
angles.copy: Brian May turns 74, we look back at the iconic guitarist's career with Queen, who turns 74 this year.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th, a milestone for the rock legend who turns 83 this year.

angles.name: Mick Jagger at 83
angles.copy: Mick Jagger turns 83, we celebrate the life and career of The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, who turns 83 this year.

events.title: MTV Launched 45 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV was launched 45 years ago, first airing the Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' and revolutionizing music television.

angles.name: MTV at 45
angles.copy: MTV launched 45 years ago, changing the music landscape with its innovative approach to music television.

events.title: Oasis Release Definitely Maybe 32 Years Ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago, marking the beginning of the Britpop era.

angles.name: Oasis Debut
angles.copy: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' was released 32 years ago, we look back at the album that started the Britpop phenomenon.

events.title: Woodstock Festival Took Place 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a pivotal moment in music history that still inspires today.

angles.name: Woodstock Legacy
angles.copy: The Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, we remember the impact of this groundbreaking event on music and culture.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away 49 years ago, leaving behind a legacy as the King of Rock and Roll.

angles.name: Elvis Remembered
angles.copy: We pay tribute to Elvis Presley on the anniversary of his death, celebrating the life and music of the rock legend.

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot 30 Years Ago
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, a tragic event that ultimately took the life of the influential rapper.

angles.name: Tupac Legacy
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, we reflect on his enduring impact on hip-hop and his lasting legacy.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away 57 years ago, leaving behind a remarkable body of work that continues to inspire musicians.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Remembered
angles.copy: We pay tribute to Jimi Hendrix on the anniversary of his death, celebrating the innovative and influential guitarist.

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago, a landmark record in their discography.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' was released 57 years ago, we look back at the making and impact of this beloved album.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday on September 7th, a milestone for the rock icon who turns 75 this year.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde at 75
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde turns 75, we celebrate the life and career of the Pretenders' legendary frontwoman, who turns 75 this year.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 55
events.blurb: Oasis' frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 55th birthday on September 21st, a day to recognize his contributions to Britpop and rock music as he turns 55.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher at 55
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher turns 55, we look back at the career of the Oasis legend, who turns 55 this year.

events.title: John Lennon Released Imagine 51 Years Ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album 'Imagine' 51 years ago, a powerful statement of peace and humanity.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released 51 years ago, we reflect on the impact and message of this timeless album.

events.title: Apple Released the First iPod 25 Years Ago
events.blurb: Apple launched the first iPod 25 years ago, revolutionizing the way people listen to music on-the-go.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: The first iPod was released 25 years ago, we look back at how it changed the music industry and our listening habits.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated on October 5th, a day to recognize the iconic spy and his enduring impact on popular culture.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day, we're shaken not stirred by the lasting influence of 007 on film and culture.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon would have been 86 on October 9th, a tribute to the life and legacy of the Beatles legend.

angles.name: John Lennon Tribute
angles.copy: John Lennon would have been 86, we remember the incredible life, music, and message of the Beatles icon.
